items.desc: Vollständig recyclebar. Minimale CO2-Bilanz bei der Herstellung. Weil wahre technologische Macht immer auch Verantwortung für die Zukunft bedeutet.

values.title: Das Fundament unseres Handelns.
values.desc: Technologie allein reicht nicht. Wahre Größe manifestiert sich in der Art und Weise, wie ein Unternehmen mit seiner Umwelt, seinen Mitarbeitern und seinen Partnern agiert.

items.title: Kunden-Obsession
items.desc: Wir bedienen nicht einfach Märkte, wir dominieren sie durch radikale Kundenfokussierung. Ihre Anforderungen sind unser Befehl. Unsere Lösungen sind präzise, skalierbar und absolut kompromisslos in ihrer Ausführung.

items.title: Strategische Allianzen
items.desc: Wir suchen keine Lieferanten, wir formen strategische Allianzen mit den besten Rohstoffproduzenten des Planeten. Gemeinsame Forschung, gemeinsame Qualitätsstandards, gemeinsame Dominanz.

items.title: Ökologischer Imperativ
items.desc: Nachhaltigkeit ist bei K-Aqua kein Marketing-Slogan, sondern ein physikalischer Imperativ. Langlebigkeit ist der ultimative Umweltschutz. Unsere Systeme minimieren den energetischen Fußabdruck von der Produktion bis zum Recycling.

co2.lead: Model your construction project across its entire lifecycle and compare the K-Aqua system directly with copper, stainless steel and PVC — validated via ISO 14040/44 for LEED, BREEAM and DGNB.
co2.guideText:
Comprehensive Life-Cycle Assessment (LCA) & Carbon Footprint Methodology

In modern Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) engineering and sustainable industrial building design, evaluating the environmental footprint of piping infrastructure is vital for achieving net-zero carbon targets, securing green building certifications, and ensuring long-term operational economy. The K-Aqua CO₂ & Life-Cycle Assessment Calculator provides consulting engineers, ESG auditors, municipal planners, and contractors with an empirical, ISO-validated framework to quantify embodied and operational greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. By modeling entire piping networks across all standard lifecycle stages—from raw material extraction to end-of-life recycling—this tool offers actionable insight into carbon reduction strategies for domestic hot and cold water distribution, HVAC chilled water loops, industrial process lines, and compressed air systems.

1. Life-Cycle Assessment Methodology & EN 15804 Standards

Our calculation engine strictly adheres to ISO 14040/14044 life-cycle assessment principles and EN 15804 standards for Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs). The evaluation spans four comprehensive lifecycle modules:

  • Module A1–A3 (Cradle-to-Gate Production): Encompasses raw material extraction, polymer synthesis, compound stabilization, and high-precision extrusion or injection molding of PP-RCT pipes and fittings. Polypropylene Random Copolymer with modified crystallinity (PP-RCT) requires substantially lower processing temperatures and energy inputs during manufacture compared to high-temperature metal smelting required for copper, stainless steel, or ductile iron.
  • Module A4–A5 (Transport & Installation): Measures logistics impact based on distance and transport mode (road, maritime, or air freight) as well as installation methodology. Due to PP-RCT’s lightweight structure—approximately 70% to 80% lighter than metallic piping—transportation fuel consumption and onsite crane operations are minimized. Trenchless technologies (such as Horizontal Directional Drilling) further diminish heavy machinery diesel emissions during underground utility laying.
  • Module B (Operational Phase & Energy Hydrodynamics): Evaluates long-term operational energy consumption over the system lifespan (typically 50 years). The ultra-smooth inner surface of K-Aqua PP-RCT pipes (absolute roughness k = 0.007 mm) suppresses friction loss, reducing pump head requirements and associated grid electricity usage. Furthermore, PP-RCT exhibits low thermal conductivity (0.24 W/mK), preventing unwanted heat dissipation in heating networks and thermal gain in chilled water circuits, drastically outperforming uninsulated or minimally insulated metal pipes.
  • Module C & D (End-of-Life & Circular Economy): Calculates emissions associated with demolition, transport to waste processing, and material recovery. Under Module D, 100% recyclable PP-RCT earns net recycling credits by replacing virgin polyolefin feedstocks in secondary industrial applications, creating a closed-loop circular value chain.

2. Comparative Material Impact: PP-RCT vs. Metals & Traditional Plastics

Selecting the optimal piping material is a critical leverage point in building decarbonization. While traditional metallic systems like copper, stainless steel, and carbon steel possess high strength, their embodied carbon footprint is exceptionally elevated due to energy-intensive mining, refining, and smelting processes. Copper piping, for instance, requires extensive primary ore processing, resulting in upfront CO₂ emissions up to 5 to 7 times higher per meter than PP-RCT. Stainless steel exhibits similar embodied carbon penalties alongside high raw material cost volatility.

Compared to conventional polymers like PVC-C or older PP-R generations, K-Aqua PP-RCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with Temperature Resistance) features a fine-grained crystalline microstructure that permits thinner pipe walls at equivalent pressure ratings (higher SDR classes). This wall thickness reduction reduces raw polymer material usage by up to 20% while increasing internal volumetric flow capacity. Coupled with absolute immunity to chemical corrosion, tuberculation, and scale buildup, K-Aqua systems maintain constant hydraulic efficiency throughout their entire service life without performance degradation or early replacement cycles.

3. Green Building Certification & Regulatory Compliance

Integrating verified EPD data from the K-Aqua CO₂ Calculator directly supports project documentation for major international green building certification frameworks:

  • LEED v4.1 (Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design): Contributes to Building Life-Cycle Impact Reduction credits and Materials and Resources (MR) credit options for EPD disclosure and optimization.
  • BREEAM (Building Research Establishment Environmental Assessment Method): Earns credits under Mat 01 (Life Cycle Impacts) by delivering transparent, independently audited cradle-to-grave impact metrics.
  • DGNB (German Sustainable Building Council): Fulfills criteria for ENV 1.1 (Building Life Cycle Assessment) and ENV 2.1 (Flexibility and Adaptability), validating low embodied carbon and high material recyclability.

4. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

How does fluid velocity affect long-term carbon emissions in piping systems?

Fluid velocity directly influences hydraulic pressure drop according to the Darcy-Weisbach equation. Higher velocities increase internal friction quadratically, forcing circulation pumps to draw significantly more electrical energy. Over a 50-year operating horizon, pump energy consumption frequently represents up to 60-70% of a piping system's total lifecycle CO₂ footprint (Module B). Optimizing pipe diameter and selecting low-friction PP-RCT allows engineers to maintain lower flow velocities without sacrificing flow rate, minimizing operational carbon emissions.

Why does PP-RCT achieve lower lifecycle costs (TCO) than copper or stainless steel?

Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) accounts for initial capital expenditure (material costs and labor-intensive joining processes like welding or press-fitting), operating energy expenses, and maintenance overhead. K-Aqua PP-RCT utilizes fast, reliable homogeneous thermal fusion socket welding, eliminating expensive soldering materials, open-flame fire permits, and specialized press tools. When combined with superior insulation properties, zero corrosion maintenance, and lower initial material costs, PP-RCT typically delivers a Return on Investment (ROI) and significant cost savings within the first 3 to 5 years of operation.

Can the LCA report generated by this tool be exported for formal audits?

Yes. The tool generates comprehensive PDF certificates containing complete itemized breakdowns across Modules A1 through C4, hydrodynamic loss parameters, equivalent environmental savings metrics (such as equivalent trees planted or passenger car kilometers avoided), and verifiable references to ISO 14040/44 EPD documentation for immediate submission to certifying bodies and building auditors.

meta.title: Schulungen | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Schulungen – Kompromisslose Sicherheit durch German Engineering für globale Megaprojekte.

hero.desc: Das K-Aqua Schulungsprogramm ist keine gewöhnliche Weiterbildung. Es ist die Initiation in die kompromisslose Welt des deutschen Rohrleitungsbaus. Für Ingenieure und Techniker, die Megaprojekte verantworten, in denen Materialversagen keine Option, sondern eine absolute Katastrophe darstellt. Wir lehren in Mikrometern, wir denken in Jahrzehnten.

manifesto.p1: Sie ist das Resultat unerbittlicher Methodik und eiskalter, industrieller Disziplin. Wenn Tausende Kubikmeter Wasser unter enormem Druck durch die Lebensadern eines 100-stöckigen Hochhauses gepumpt werden, gibt es keinen Spielraum für Näherungswerte oder Interpretationen.
manifesto.p2: Das K-Aqua Schulungsprogramm wurde entwickelt, um die Lücke zwischen theoretischem Wissen und fehlerfreier, maschineller Perfektion zu schließen. Wer in unserer Akademie trainiert wird, agiert nicht mehr als bloßer Handwerker – er wird zum ausführenden Organ eines perfekten, deterministischen Systems.

bento.title: Wissen als absolute Waffe.
bento.lead: Unsere technischen Schulungsmodule sind nicht dafür konzipiert, es Ihnen leicht zu machen. Sie sind dafür konzipiert, Fehler gnadenlos auszumerzen.

items.title: Homogene Materialverschmelzung
items.desc: Jenseits von Verklebungen oder instabilen mechanischen Dichtungen. Wir trainieren die exakte Kalibrierung von Temperatur, Druck und Zeit, um Rohre und Fittings auf molekularer Ebene zu einer untrennbaren, monolithischen Struktur zu verschmelzen.

items.title: Destruktive Analytik
items.desc: Um die Grenzen zu verstehen, muss man sie überschreiten. Praxis-Module in unseren Hochdruck-Prüfständen mit Berstdrücken weit jenseits der 100 Bar. Wir analysieren das Versagen, um es in der Praxis auszuschließen.

items.title: Thermische Längenausdehnung
items.desc: Eiskalte Kompensation von Temperaturschwankungen in Großprojekten durch präzise berechnete Dehnungsbögen und Festpunkt-Systeme.

items.title: Aggressive Medien & pH-Stabilität
items.desc: Tiefen-Analyse der Widerstandsfähigkeit gegen hochkonzentrierte industrielle Chemikalien. Die Akademie vermittelt tiefgehende Kenntnisse zur Materialermüdung unter chemischer Dauerbelastung und radikalen pH-Verschiebungen.

curriculum.title: Akademische Kompromisslosigkeit.
curriculum.lead: Vier Module. Eine Doktrin. Jedes Segment unseres Curriculums ist darauf ausgerichtet, Schwächen in der Ausführung zu identifizieren und systemisch zu vernichten.

items.title: Modul Alpha: Strömungsmechanik & Kinetik
items.desc: Die Mathematik des Wassers. Wir zerlegen komplexe Kavitationseffekte und Druckschlag-Szenarien in berechenbare Variablen. Sie lernen, hydrodynamische Schocksymptome nicht nur zu dämpfen, sondern systemisch zu eliminieren. Für Rohrnetze, die in völliger, geräuschloser Perfektion operieren.

items.title: Modul Beta: Parametrisches Leitungsdesign
items.desc: Der Entwurf von Rohrleitungssystemen als algorithmische Disziplin. Die Schulung beinhaltet den Einsatz modernster CAD/BIM-Tools zur Kollisionsprüfung und zur Optimierung der Materialausnutzung. Keine Schätzung. Reine, eiskalte Berechnung.

items.title: Modul Gamma: Hygiene-Architektur & Mikrobiologie
items.desc: Legionellenprävention auf strukturellem Level. Wie man Totleitungen vermeidet, Stagnationszonen auslöscht und Wassertemperatur-Schichtungen in komplexen Ringleitungs-Systemen kontrolliert. Das System diktiert die Reinheit – wir überlassen nichts dem Zufall.

items.title: Modul Delta: Das finale K-Aqua Audit
items.desc: Prüfung ist kein Recht, sie ist ein Privileg. Die Prüfung verlangt die Konstruktion und theoretische Verteidigung eines autarken Wasserversorgungs-Systems unter simulierten Extrembedingungen (z.B. seismische Aktivität, 50°C Außentemperatur). Nur wer absolute Fehlerfreiheit beweist, trägt das K-Aqua Zertifikat.

timeline.title: Der Zertifizierungs-Pfad.
timeline.desc: Die Transformation vom Installateur zum geprüften K-Aqua Master-Engineer folgt einem strikten, unerbittlichen Rhythmus. Nur wer diesen Pfad bis zum Ende geht, erhält die Autorisation für unsere Hochleistungs-Systeme.

items.title: Materialphysik & Onboarding
items.text: Das Begreifen der physikalischen Limits. Eine tiefgreifende Einführung in die molekularen PP-R/PP-RCT Werkstoff-Spezifikationen. Hier wird das Fundament der industriellen Härte gegossen.

items.title: Laboratorium & Belastungstests
items.text: Hands-on Zerstörung. Das Erleben der Berstgrenze im Prüfstand und das Studium mikroskopischer Rissbildungen. Nur wer die Schwäche kennt, kann die absolute Stärke konstruieren.

items.title: Fusions-Doktrin
items.text: Das perfekte Schweißprotokoll. Mechanisches Training der thermodynamischen Bewegungsabläufe bis zum unfehlbaren, muskulären Automatismus. Jeder Handgriff ist kalibriert.

items.title: System-Architektur
items.text: Skalierung vom einfachen Rohrsegment zur Infrastruktur eines Wolkenkratzers. Wir exekutieren Druckverlusttabellen, Fließgeschwindigkeiten und Strömungsteiler mit eiserner Logik.

items.title: Die Meisterprüfung
items.text: Ein 48-stündiges Audit unter der gnadenlosen Aufsicht der deutschen Chef-Ingenieure. Keine Toleranz für Fehlkalkulationen. Ein Fehler bedeutet den sofortigen Ausschluss.

spec.title: Die globale Benchmark für Sicherheit.
spec.desc: Unsere Prüfung ist nicht nur ein Stück Papier. Sie ist ein in Titan gegossenes Versprechen an Bauherren und Investoren weltweit. Wo das K-Aqua Zertifikat vorliegt, wurde die Installation nach den strengsten deutschen Ingenieurs-Standards durchgeführt.

items.title: Internationale Gültigkeit
items.text: Anerkannt von den weltweit führenden Bau- und Aufsichtsbehörden.

items.title: Audit-Transparenz
items.text: Lückenlose, digitale Dokumentation jedes Schweißvorgangs.

items.title: Lebenslange Autorität
items.text: Einmal erworben, zeichnet es den Engineer als Teil einer elitären Kaste aus.

cta.desc: Unterwerfen Sie sich dem Maßstab deutscher Ingenieurskunst. Senden Sie uns Ihr Profil oder fordern Sie die Spezifikationen für firmeninterne Audits an.

meta.title: Certificates & Standards | K-Aqua
meta.desc: DVGW, SKZ, ISO and more. Discover the uncompromising safety and German engineering quality of the K-Aqua piping systems.

hero.desc: This module delivers uncompromising security for the most demanding projects worldwide. Crafted to the strictest industry standards to last for generations. Because material failure is never an option.

manifesto.title2: The process behind it is made of steel.
manifesto.p1: Many manufacturers see standards as the ultimate goal. We see it as the absolute lower limit. Our internal tolerances are many times stricter than what DVGW, ISO or SKZ require. When a K-Aqua pipe leaves our factory, it has been analyzed at the molecular level, tortured with extreme pressures and thermally pushed to the absolute limit.

bento.title: The DNA of a perfect pipe system.
bento.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't trust marketing promises. They demand hard, physically measurable facts.

items.title: Extreme pressure resistance
items.desc: tested for continuous loads up to PN20/PN25. Our burst pressure tests prove reserves that go far beyond the standards. Burst pipes are a thing of the past.

items.title: Thermal sovereignty
items.desc: Permanently resistant from -20°C to +95°C. No material fatigue, no structural weakening – even in the event of extreme thermal shocks.

items.title: Absolute hygiene
items.desc: No corrosion. No incrustation. Food-safe, toxicologically harmless and resistant to legionella growth.

items.title: Fire protection (B1/B2)
items.desc: Classified according to DIN 4102. Flame retardant and minimal smoke development for maximum safety in critical building infrastructures.

items.title: Life cycle guarantee
items.desc: A defined service life of 50 years according to the strictest ISO standard. In architectural reality, however, they are built to last entire generations.

certifications.title: The toughest examiners in the world.
certifications.lead: Only those who pass the most critical external audits are allowed to bear the 'German Engineering' label. Here are the institutions that validate our quality.

items.title: DVGW – The highest authority
items.p1: The German Gas and Water Association (DVGW) sets the world's strictest standards for drinking water hygiene and material resistance.
items.p2: Our DVGW certification guarantees that K-Aqua pipe systems neither release toxic substances nor promote microbiological growth under extreme conditions. Each batch undergoes long-term hydrostatic tests (creep internal pressure test) at 95°C.

items.title: SKZ – Independent monitoring
items.p1: The South German Plastics Center (SKZ) acts as our incorruptible auditor. External third-party monitoring ensures what our internal laboratories already specify.
items.p2: Notched impact strength, tensile strength and thermal behavior are tested using DSC analysis (Dynamic Scanning Calorimetry). The SKZ mark is proof of mechanical perfection, far beyond DIN EN ISO 15874.

items.title: KTW-BWGL – Absolute purity
items.p1: The assessment basis for plastics and other organic materials in contact with drinking water (Federal Environment Agency).
items.p2: We only use high-purity polypropylene (PP-R / PP-RCT) without harmful additives or heavy metals. The result? Spring water quality straight from the tap. No smell or taste impairment.

items.title: ISO 9001 & 14001 – Systematic Excellence
items.p1: Quality is not a coincidence, but an absolutely reproducible process. Our ISO 9001 certification proves seamless quality management from the receipt of raw materials to the worldwide delivery of goods.
items.p2: With ISO 14001 we prove that industrial excellence and ecological responsibility go hand in hand. Minimized energy consumption, efficient use of resources and the 100% recyclability of our PP products.

lab.desc: Before a K-Aqua system leaves the factory, it must go through our in-house test center. A highly upgraded facility where we expose materials to conditions they will never experience in reality.

items.title: MFR (Melt Flow Rate)
items.desc: Control melt flow rate to ensure accurate viscosity during extrusion and subsequent welding on site.

items.title: OIT (Oxidation Induction Time)
items.desc: Thermal analysis to determine aging resistance. Proof that our stabilizers protect plastic from degradation for decades.

items.title: Creep internal pressure test
items.desc: Pipe samples are stored in special water baths at 95°C under extreme pressure – for thousands of hours. Without crack. Without breakage.

timeline.title: Decades of innovation.
timeline.desc: Our quality standards were not created overnight. They are the result of decades of engineering and continuous process optimization.

items.title: The birth of the standard
items.text: As pioneers of plastic pipe extrusion, we implemented internal testing procedures at an early stage that went far beyond the industry requirements of the time. The foundation for an uncompromising quality culture.

items.title: ISO 9001 integration
items.text: The complete certification of our quality management systems according to ISO 9001. Every move, every raw material batch, every machine setting is now systematically documented and made completely traceable.

items.title: DVGW & SKZ certification
items.text: Inclusion in the exclusive circle of DVGW and SKZ tested manufacturers. The official seal for absolute hygiene, extreme pressure resistance and unsurpassed durability under the toughest conditions in drinking water use.

items.title: Global standards (WRAS, KTW)
items.text: Expansion of certifications for international markets. Compliance with the strict KTW guidelines (UBA) and the British WRAS requirements. K-Aqua is becoming the global standard for international megaprojects.

items.title: Next-Gen Quality Analytics
items.text: Introduction of highly automated OIT (Oxidation Induction Time) and MFR (Melt Flow Rate) tests in our own precision laboratory. AI-supported error analysis during extrusion for a 100% zero-defect rate.

cta.title: Quality you can trust blindly.
cta.desc: Download our official certificates or speak directly to our engineering team about the specifications of your next mega-project.

meta.title: Technical Glossary | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Glossary – Uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: Welcome to the lexical core of piping technology. Here we decode the principles of German engineering. No marketing. Just physical facts, materials science and industrial authority.

manifesto.title: The Architecture of Infallibility.
manifesto.lead: A piping system is the cardiovascular system of any megaproject. A failure means an infrastructural heart attack. That's why we're not talking about pipes, but about vital industrial arteries. Each term in this glossary represents a pillar of our zero-defect philosophy.

scroll.title: The K-Aqua process.
scroll.lead: From the molecular granulate level to the final pressure test. Understand the physical principles that make our systems indestructible.

items.title: Extrusion dynamics under high pressure
items.desc: Thermoplastic forming in our factories is subject to precise temperature control to within 0.1°C. This crystalline perfection guarantees a flawless, homogeneous molecular structure that absolutely excludes microscopic cracking, even under extreme pressure and temperature fluctuations. When the material leaves our extruder, it is no longer a simple plastic - it is an industrial monolith.

items.title: Hydrostatic load tests
items.desc: In our test laboratories, every pipe is subjected to a hydrostatic simulation that exceeds real conditions many times over. We apply internal pressures that go beyond any normative requirement (up to 100 bar, depending on the SDR class). This ensures the integrity of the welds and the molecular elasticity of the PP-R material over a predicted service life of more than 50 years in critical infrastructure.

items.title: Polyfusion welding technology
items.desc: Connections are the weak point in traditional systems. K-Aqua eliminates this risk through polyfusion. At the molecular level, pipe and fitting merge into an inseparable, continuous unit. There are no threads to corrode, no seals to fail. The result is a piping system that behaves as if it were cast from a single piece.

items.title: Cavitation resistance & fluid mechanics
items.desc: Thanks to an ultra-smooth inner wall (roughness < 0.007 mm), K-Aqua pipes minimize flow resistance to zero. This prevents the formation of biofilms and eliminates micro-cavitation effects in high-velocity flows. Pressure losses in the system are drastically reduced, maximizing the energy efficiency of the connected pump systems on an industrial scale.

bento.title: Technical parameters.
bento.lead: The most important vocabulary of industrial piping technology, distilled to its essence.

items.title: PP-R (Polypropylene Random Copolymer)
items.desc: The molecular basis. A highly crystalline thermoplastic polymer that offers exceptional resistance to high temperatures and pressures. It is the DNA of our longevity.

items.title: Linear thermal expansion
items.desc: The change in length of the material when the temperature changes. Our fiber-reinforced (fiber) pipes reduce this value to an absolute minimum (α = 0.035 mm/mK), which enormously increases the structural stability in shafts.

items.title: creep strength
items.desc: The ability of the system to withstand constant internal pressure at specific temperatures for decades without deforming or bursting. K-Aqua pipes are calibrated to last 50+ years.

items.title: Pressure loss coefficient
items.desc: A mathematical value that describes the energy loss of the flow due to friction on the inner wall of the pipe. This value is marginalized in K-Aqua systems due to nano-smooth surfaces.

items.title: SDR (Standard Dimension Ratio)
items.desc: The relationship between the outside diameter (d) and the wall thickness (s). An SDR 6 tube can withstand massively higher pressures than an SDR 11 tube. The correct choice is crucial for system design.
items.label: 50+ YRS

timeline.title: Regulatory toughness.
timeline.desc: For us, standards are not regulations, but rather the starting point of our engineering skills. A chronology of the certifications and standards that our systems not only meet, but dominate.

items.title: Normative basis
items.text: The basis of German piping standards. We do not view these standards as a goal, but as an absolute minimum. Our internal tolerances are up to 30% stricter than required by DIN.

items.title: Global certification
items.text: The international seal of quality for plastic piping systems for hot and cold water installations. Proof of the uncompromising global applicability of our systems.

items.title: Standard Dimension Ratios
items.text: A precise ratio of outside diameter to wall thickness. Our engineers calibrate each batch to guarantee maximum pressure resistance at optimal flow rate.

items.title: Hygiene & material testing
items.text: Certificates that certify the absolute authenticity of food and drinking water. No heavy metals, no leaching. Pure, uncontaminated fluid dynamics for the highest hygienic demands.

conclusion.title: Resistance to decomposition in extreme cases.
conclusion.p1: In industrial applications, it is not the normal operation that determines the quality of a piping system, but rather the stability in the limit areas. Chemical corrosion, cavitation from pressure shocks and thermal shock are the natural enemies of conventional installations.
conclusion.p2: The K-Aqua Matrix isolates the fluid medium from the environment through an inert barrier layer. There is no ion exchange. Metallic systems degrade from the moment water flows through them. They sacrifice themselves in order to function. Our PP-R system remains flawless inside even after decades.
conclusion.p3: The term environmental stress cracking resistance (ESCR) is of central importance in polymer chemistry. We modify the molecular weight of our copolymer so that it absorbs peak loads rather than breaking under them. The result is a system that absorbs shocks, vibrations and settlement of the building structure.
conclusion.p4: Anyone who understands the terminology of piping technology also understands why compromises can mean ruin. German Engineering is not an empty promise, but the sum of precise, physical parameters that we manifest in every single centimeter of our production.

buyers.whyTitle: Six reasons that land in the calculation.

rfq.doneText: Your email client has opened with the pre-filled enquiry. Send it off — we will be in touch within one business day. Prefer to talk directly?
rfq.infoText1: Use our request tool to coordinate your building or industrial project with our experts at an early stage. Whether you are in the planning phase or already have concrete material lists – we support you with sizing and material selection.
rfq.infoText2: Through close cooperation with the K-Aqua sales team, you receive not only precise offers but also valuable technical advice regarding pressure ratings (SDR classes), installation methods, and system-compliant accessories. Send us your basic data, and we will get back to you within one business day.

faqs.q: Is the project request subject to a fee?
faqs.a: No, the use of this tool and the subsequent preparation of an offer by our sales team are completely free of charge and non-binding for you.

faqs.q: What happens after submitting the request?
faqs.a: Your request is forwarded directly to our internal sales team. A personal contact person will get in touch with you within 24 hours to clarify any open questions or directly provide you with a customized offer.

faqs.q: Can I also request as a private individual?
faqs.a: K-Aqua is primarily aimed at wholesalers, planners, and specialist installers in the B2B sector. We gladly refer private customers to our regional specialist partners.

Your entries are not stored on the server but are transferred directly to your email program, from where you securely send the request to us. We treat your data strictly confidentially according to the applicable GDPR guidelines.

productsx.pipesLead: Monolayer, PP-RCT and glass-fibre reinforced multilayer — plus UV-stabilised versions for outdoor applications.

pipes.d: The proven standard for hot and cold drinking water. Single-layer construction, full SDR range in the common dimensions — economical for residential and commercial projects.
Modified crystalline structure for extra temperature and pressure reserve: SDR 7.4 is rated for continuous operation at 70 °C and 10 bar (1.0 MPa) — the choice for hot water and circulation.
Glass-fibre reinforced core between two PP layers: thermal expansion reduced to roughly a quarter, wider clamp spacing, dimensionally stable up to d630 — up to 20 bar (2.0 MPa) at 20 °C in SDR 6.
For installations exposed to sunlight — such as greenhouses or above-ground lines — the programme is available in a UV-resistant version.

faq.q: Which media is the system designed for?
faq.a: For drinking water — hot and cold — with high temperature and pressure resistance over decades. Thanks to PP’s resistance to solvents, alkalis and acids, industrial applications are possible too; we verify those with you project by project.

faq.q: What do the five SDR classes stand for?
faq.a: SDR is the ratio of outer diameter to wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure: SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6. You pick exactly the reserve each application needs — without over-dimensioning.

faq.q: When monolayer, when K-Fiber?
faq.a: Monolayer is the economical standard for most applications. The glass-fibre composite cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter, allows wider clamp spacing and stays dimensionally stable in large bores and hot water — the choice for risers, circulation and d ≥ 160.

faq.q: How are the pipes joined?
faq.a: By fusion welding — socket welding by hand (up to d63) or machine, electrofusion via heating-coil fittings, and butt fusion for large bores up to d630. Matching devices and tools are part of the programme; the Academy shows all four methods on video.

faq.q: Is the system compliant for drinking water?
faq.a: The system is engineered for drinking water; polypropylene is neutral in taste and odour. Conformity evidence for drinking-water contact (DVGW/KTW) is available in the Trust Center as part of the RFP document package.

faq.q: What service life underlies the design?
faq.a: The pressure classes are based on the long-term regression curves of DIN 8077/8078 with a design horizon of 50 years of operation — safety factor included. The two programme anchors: SDR 6 at 20 bar/20 °C and PP-RCT SDR 7.4 at 10 bar/70 °C.

faq.q: Where do I get binding article data?
faq.a: Filter every variant live in the Product Finder and export as CSV. Binding values come from the product catalogue (PDF); for project terms, the five-step project enquiry goes straight to sales — reply within one working day.

faq.q: How long are the ISO certificates valid?
faq.a: Three years — the current cycle runs from 10/2025 to 10/2028, accompanied by annual surveillance audits by the certification body.

faq.q: What does "DAkkS-accredited" mean?
faq.a: DAkkS is Germany’s national accreditation body. It supervises the certification bodies themselves — the accreditation is what makes a certificate internationally robust.

faq.q: How do I verify a certificate?
faq.a: Every certificate carries a certificate number (e.g. Q-2025-6732) and the issuing body. With both, validity can be checked directly with the certification body — or ask us at support@k-aqua.de.

faq.q: Are scope-3 and raw EPD data available?
faq.a: Yes — we provide scope-3 emission data and raw EPD data on request. Proactive transparency instead of box-ticking: your sustainability team gets robust figures for its own accounting.

faq.q: Do you supply GAEB tender texts?
faq.a: Yes, GAEB texts are part of the RFP document package. The K-Aqua system flows into your tendering software and bills of quantities without friction.

faq.q: What is an EPD to EN 15804?
faq.a: A Type III environmental product declaration with verified life-cycle data. It is the data basis for building certifications such as LEED, BREEAM and DGNB — and for CO₂-adjusted procurement models.

academyx.paramLead: Heating, changeover and cooling times for socket welding to DVS 2207-11 (heating element 250–270 °C) — the basis demonstrated in the videos.
academyx.paramNote: Reference values to DVS 2207-11 for PP at 250–270 °C element temperature. The welding-device manufacturer’s specifications and the processing instructions remain binding — in doubt: watch the video, check the device parameters.
academyx.stepLead: Each method has its dimension range — and five steps that decide the quality of the joint.

procs.t: Socket welding by hand — up to d63

steps.d: Cut the pipe square, deburr and chamfer cleanly — use the pipe cutters from the K-Aqua tool programme.
Mark the depth per table (e.g. 14 mm at d20) on the pipe — it defines the fusion zone.
Pipe into the heating socket, fitting onto the spigot — push on simultaneously and hold the heating time exactly.
Join axially within the changeover time. Never rotate: twisting destroys the plasticised structure.
Hold the joint for a few seconds, then respect the cooling time before applying any mechanical load.

procs.t: Socket welding by machine — medium dimensions

steps.d: Cutting, deburring, marking the depth — the ground rules stay identical.
The machine holds both parts coaxially — offset and tilt errors are mechanically excluded.
Heating socket and spigot per DVS reference values; the machine holds position and time reproducibly.
The feed joins axially and evenly — at d75 to d125 the key to consistent quality.
Unclamp and continue working only after the cooling time has elapsed.
Scrape and clean the pipe surface in the fusion zone — oxide skin and dirt prevent fusion.
Mark the depth on the pipe, push the pipe into the fitting up to the stop.
Use holding clamps — the fitting must not be under bending stress during welding.
The unit energises the heating coils embedded in the fitting — parameters come from the fitting, not from gut feeling.
Move or load only after the stated cooling time — check the indicators on the fitting.

procs.t: Butt fusion — large bores up to d630

steps.d: Plane both pipe ends in the machine until continuous shavings appear — plane-parallel faces are mandatory.
Offset no more than 10 % of the wall thickness — at d630 every millimetre counts.
Equalise under pressure until the bead forms, then heat-soak without pressure — times per DVS 2207-11.
Remove the element swiftly and bring the ends together under the defined joining pressure.
Joining pressure stays on until the cooling time ends — producing the homogeneous, permanently tight run.

academyx.errTitle: The six costliest mistakes — and their prevention.
errRows: The bead grows inwards and narrows the cross-section
Stop the heating time by the table — not by feel
The plasticised structure is destroyed, the joint leaks
Join axially only, use the depth mark as a control
Material piles up, the fusion zone becomes uneven
Deburr every cut — the tool is part of the system
Residues burn and embed themselves in the seam
Wipe the heating surfaces with a lint-free cloth before every weld
The seam deforms before it solidifies
Respect cooling times — 8 minutes at d110
Too short: small fusion area · too deep: narrowed bore
Always mark the depth, never estimate
gloss: SDR
Standard Dimension Ratio = outer diameter divided by wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure.
PN
Nominal pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6.
d / di / s
Outer diameter / inner diameter / wall thickness in millimetres — di = d − 2s.
PP-R
Polypropylene random copolymer — the proven standard material for drinking-water installations.
PP-RCT
PP-R with modified crystalline structure ("crystallinity temperature") — more temperature and pressure reserve at the same wall.
K-Fiber / GF
Glass-fibre reinforced multilayer construction — cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter.
Socket welding
Pipe and fitting are plasticised over a heating socket and spigot and pushed together.
Electrofusion
Heating coils embedded in the fitting generate the fusion heat — parameter-controlled.
Butt fusion
Plane-parallel pipe ends are heated at an element and joined under pressure — standard up to d630.
The rulebook for welding polypropylene — source of the reference values on this page.

posts.teaser: KWT GmbH’s ISO management system now covers quality, environment and energy — DAkkS-accredited.
body: Since October 2025, KWT GmbH’s management system is triple tested: ISO 9001:2015 for quality, ISO 14001:2015 for environment and ISO 50001:2018 for energy. The certificates are issued by a DAkkS-accredited certification body and are valid until October 2028.

For procurement and compliance this means documented, auditable processes from extruder to dispatch. The lived GENAU management system already met the requirements of DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001 — certification makes it externally robust.
Both certificate versions (DE/EN) are available for download; bundle the full audit package in the Trust Center.

posts.t: Continuously marked: traceability from the extruder
posts.teaser: Every K-Aqua pipe carries continuous marking applied directly in the extrusion process.
body: At up to 14,000 metres of pipe per day and line, traceability is not optional: every pipe is continuously marked during extrusion — with the information specifiers and inspectors need on site.

The marking links the physical product to its batch and the QA test records. What is printed on the pipe can be traced back to the test lab — one building block of the QA manual that auditors can request in the Trust Center.

posts.teaser: From flare gas to drinking-water pipe: the short material history of polypropylene.
body: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be flared off uselessly — using them as a material cuts air pollution at the source. As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids and forms complex geometries in injection moulding.

Inside the pipe, the bore is what counts: at 0.007 mm roughness, pressure loss stays minimal and biofilm and incrustation find little hold. Add thermal conductivity of 0.24 W/(m·K) — hot water stays hot without the line working against itself.
PP-RCT pushes the limits further: the modified crystalline structure brings more temperature and pressure reserve — SDR 7.4 sustains 70 °C at 10 bar continuously.

posts.t: Brass meets polypropylene: transitions into existing stock
posts.teaser: Renovation almost always means a system change — transition pieces with brass threads make it clean.
body: Hardly any project starts on a greenfield: existing copper or galvanised-steel lines must be connected. Transition pieces with embedded brass female or male threads do the job — the thread side connects the metal stock, the PP side is fusion-welded.

This enables section-by-section renovation: corroded runs are replaced, working ones remain — and the corrosion problem does not migrate into the new system. Unions keep the connection detachable where needed, e.g. at valves and water meters.

newsx.ishText: The building-services industry meets at ISH in Frankfurt — the world’s leading trade fair where partner KESSEL regularly shows presence. As soon as K-Aqua dates are fixed, they will appear here.

contactx.routeLead: Three mailboxes, clear responsibilities — each answered within one working day.

Material and processing questions, certificates, complaints.
Applications and questions about working at K-Aqua — directly to Andrea Nickel.

faq.q: What belongs in a good project enquiry?
faq.a: Project type, required dimensions (rough is fine), estimated run length, delivery region and timeframe. Exactly these five points are what the structured project enquiry asks — filled in within two minutes.

faq.q: How fast do I get an answer?
faq.a: Within one working day — sales answers project enquiries personally, the support team handles technical questions.

faq.q: Can I visit or audit the plant?
faq.a: Yes, by appointment. For supplier audits we recommend the RFP document package from the Trust Center in advance — it makes the on-site visit maximally efficient.

faq.q: Where do I find certificates and tender texts?
faq.a: ISO certificates (DE/EN) under Service & Downloads, the complete audit package including GAEB texts in the Trust Center — self-service, no waiting.

careerx.areaLead: Creativity and experience are the basis of our market-leading solutions — four areas carry them, across the Waldsolms plant.

areas.d: Set up, run and monitor extrusion lines with up to 14,000 metres of daily output — plus injection moulding for fittings from d20 to d315.
areas.p: Technical understanding, diligence, willingness to work shifts

areas.d: Keep extruders, tools and peripherals running: maintenance, fault analysis and continuous improvement per GENAU.
areas.p: Training in mechatronics, electrics or metalwork — find causes instead of patching symptoms

areas.d: Accompany projects from Frankfurt to the Middle East: consulting on dimensions, SDR classes and welding technology — direct from the manufacturer.
areas.p: Technical consulting skills, languages are a plus

areas.d: Order processing, purchasing and organisation — the processes that keep quality compatible with cost and deadlines.
areas.p: Structured way of working, joy in clear processes

careerx.areaNote: Your profile is missing? Speculative applications are expressly welcome — the company is growing.

why.d: A strong position that keeps being expanded — your work visibly contributes to the success.
GENAU makes occupational safety daily practice: reporting hazards is a duty and is taken seriously — by everyone, for everyone.
Pipes designed for 50 years of operation, working in hospitals and hotels worldwide — results that last.
Tax-free extras from the benefits card to the JobRad — calculate above what your package brings.

proc.d: By e-mail to Andrea Nickel — via the CV generator or the direct application on this page. No cover-letter novel needed.
We get back to you promptly and discuss the day-to-day honestly — also by phone at +49 (0)60 85 / 9868-410.
See production and team in Waldsolms before you decide — then comes the contract offer.

refsx.secLead: Over the past decades, K-Aqua products have proven themselves countless times in destinations all over the world — these building types shape the reference programme.

sectors.d: Hygienic drinking-water distribution with a biofilm-inhibiting bore — as in the hospital build in Cape Town.
Hot-water circulation in continuous operation, thermally efficient — as in the Istanbul hotel complex with fibre-composite pipe.
Chemically resistant and corrosion-free for process and service water — from commercial builds to production halls.
UV-stabilised irrigation under glass and supply networks up to d630 — as in the Singapore infrastructure project.

finderx.helpLead: Five terms are enough to understand every row of the range.
help: Outer diameter in millimetres — the key size of every dimension from d20 to d630.
Standard Dimension Ratio = d/s. Smaller SDR means thicker wall and higher nominal pressure.
Wall thickness in millimetres — follows from d and SDR: s = d/SDR.
Inner diameter = d − 2s. Decisive for flow rate and pressure loss.
Permissible continuous operating pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 = PN 20 down to SDR 17 = PN 6.

flow.d: Narrow down type, SDR and maximum dimension — or type "d110" straight into the search.
Click a row for wall thickness, di and nominal pressure in detail — the result list flows into your costing via CSV.
From the detail panel straight into the project enquiry — we finalise dimensions and quantities together.

co2x.methLead: Transparency instead of a black box — four building blocks behind every result.

meth.d: Pipe mass follows from ring cross-section × length × density (0.905 g/cm³) — the same geometry as in the dimension tables.
The emission factors per material are demonstration values for the system comparison. Binding factors come from ecoinvent or product-specific Type III EPDs to EN 15804.
Converted at roughly 25 kg of CO₂ bound per tree per year and 0.15 kg CO₂e per car kilometre — orders of magnitude everyone in the project meeting understands.
For audits and certification, the document counts: EPD data sheets and scope-3 data are available in the Trust Center or on request.

co2x.certLead: CO₂ evidence is not an end in itself — it pays directly into building certifications.

certs.d: EPDs to EN 15804 pay into the material credits — the calculator delivers the early argument, the EPD the proof.
Life-cycle data of materials flows into the assessment — robust through Type III declarations.
The building’s life-cycle assessment decides entire criteria groups — low-GWP material choice acts directly.

co2x.scopeText: Scope 1 covers the plant’s direct emissions, scope 2 the purchased electricity, scope 3 the supply chain — including the pipes you buy. That is why K-Aqua provides scope-3 data and raw EPD data on request: proactive transparency for your own climate accounting.
co2x.statNote: From industry studies: about half of B2B customers prefer to buy from demonstrably sustainable suppliers — the evidence becomes a procurement criterion.

plant.l: pipe production per extrusion line — capacity for large projects
inner surface roughness — minimal pressure loss, hardly any biofilm
design horizon per the long-term curves of DIN 8077/8078

sections.title: 1. An overview of data protection
sections.content:
General
The following gives a simple overview of what happens to your personal information when you visit our website. Personal information is any data with which you could be personally identified. Detailed information on the subject of data protection can be found in our privacy policy found below.

Data collection on our website
Who is responsible for the data collection on this website?
The data collected on this website are processed by the website operator. The operator's contact details can be found in the website's required legal notice.

How do we collect your data?
Some data are collected when you provide it to us. This could, for example, be data you enter on a contact form.
Other data are collected automatically by our IT systems when you visit the website. These data are primarily technical data such as the browser and operating system you are using or when you accessed the page. These data are collected automatically as soon as you enter our website.

What do we use your data for?
Part of the data is collected to ensure the proper functioning of the website. Other data can be used to analyze how visitors use the site.

What rights do you have regarding your data?
You always have the right to request information about your stored data, its origin, its recipients, and the purpose of its collection at no charge. You also have the right to request that it be corrected, blocked, or deleted. You can contact us at any time using the address given in the legal notice if you have further questions about the issue of privacy and data protection. You may also, of course, file a complaint with the competent regulatory authorities.

sections.title: 2. General information and mandatory information
sections.content:
The operators of this website take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data as confidential and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.

If you use this website, various pieces of personal data will be collected. Personal information is any data with which you could be personally identified. This privacy policy explains what information we collect and what we use it for. It also explains how and for what purpose this happens.

Please note that data transmitted via the internet (e.g. via email communication) may be subject to security breaches. Complete protection of your data from third-party access is not possible.

Notice concerning the party responsible for this website
The party responsible for processing data on this website is:

KWT GmbH
Auweg 3
35647, Waldsolms-Brandoberndorf
(0)60 85 / 9868-410
info@k-aqua.de

The responsible party is the natural or legal person who alone or jointly with others decides on the purposes and means of processing personal data (names, email addresses, etc.).

Revocation of your consent to the processing of your data
Many data processing operations are only possible with your express consent. You may revoke your consent at any time with future effect. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed

Right to file complaints with regulatory authorities
If there has been a breach of data protection legislation, the person affected may file a complaint with the competent regulatory authorities. The competent regulatory authority for matters related to data protection legislation is the data protection officer of the German state in which our company is headquartered. A list of data protection officers and their contact details can be found at the following link: https://www.bfdi.bund.de/DE/Infothek/Anschriften_Links/anschriften_links-node.html.

Right to data portability
You have the right to have data which we process based on your consent or in fulfillment of a contract automatically delivered to yourself or to a third party in a standard, machine-readable format. If you require the direct transfer of data to another responsible party, this will only be done to the extent technically feasible.

SSL or TLS encryption
This site uses SSL or TLS encryption for security reasons and for the protection of the transmission of confidential content, such as the inquiries you send to us as the site operator. You can recognize an encrypted connection in your browser's address line when it changes from "http://" to "https://" and the lock icon is displayed in your browser's address bar.

If SSL or TLS encryption is activated, the data you transfer to us cannot be read by third parties.

Information, blocking, deletion
As permitted by law, you have the right to be provided at any time with information free of charge about any of your personal data that is stored as well as its origin, the recipient and the purpose for which it has been processed. You also have the right to have this data corrected, blocked or deleted. You can contact us at any time using the address given in our legal notice if you have further questions on the topic of personal data.

Opposition to promotional emails
We hereby expressly prohibit the use of contact data published in the context of website legal notice requirements with regard to sending promotional and informational materials not expressly requested. The website operator reserves the right to take specific legal action if unsolicited advertising material, such as email spam, is received.

sections.title: 4. Data collection on our website
sections.content:
Cookies
Some of our web pages use cookies. Cookies do not harm your computer and do not contain any viruses. Cookies help make our website more user-friendly, efficient, and secure. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your computer and saved by your browser.

Most of the cookies we use are so-called "session cookies." They are automatically deleted after your visit. Other cookies remain in your device's memory until you delete them. These cookies make it possible to recognize your browser when you next visit the site.

You can configure your browser to inform you about the use of cookies so that you can decide on a case-by-case basis whether to accept or reject a cookie. Alternatively, your browser can be configured to automatically accept cookies under certain conditions or to always reject them, or to automatically delete cookies when closing your browser. Disabling cookies may limit the functionality of this website.

Cookies which are necessary to allow electronic communications or to provide certain functions you wish to use (such as the shopping cart) are stored pursuant to Art. 6 paragraph 1, letter f of DSGVO. The website operator has a legitimate interest in the storage of cookies to ensure an optimized service provided free of technical errors. If other cookies (such as those used to analyze your surfing behavior) are also stored, they will be treated separately in this privacy policy.

Server log files
The website provider automatically collects and stores information that your browser automatically transmits to us in "server log files". These are:

Browser type and browser version
Operating system used
Referrer URL
Host name of the accessing computer
Time of the server request
IP address
These data will not be combined with data from other sources.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

Contact form
Should you send us questions via the contact form, we will collect the data entered on the form, including the contact details you provide, to answer your question and any follow-up questions. We do not share this information without your permission.

We will, therefore, process any data you enter onto the contact form only with your consent per Art. 6 (1)(a) DSGVO. You may revoke your consent at any time. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed.

We will retain the data you provide on the contact form until you request its deletion, revoke your consent for its storage, or the purpose for its storage no longer pertains (e.g. after fulfilling your request). Any mandatory statutory provisions, especially those regarding mandatory data retention periods, remain unaffected by this provision.

Registration on this website
You can register on our website in order to access additional functions offered here. The input data will only be used for the purpose of using the respective site or service for which you have registered. The mandatory information requested during registration must be provided in full. Otherwise, we will reject your registration.

To inform you about important changes such as those within the scope of our site or technical changes, we will use the email address specified during registration.

We will process the data provided during registration only based on your consent per Art. 6 (1)(a) DSGVO. You may revoke your consent at any time with future effect. An informal email making this request is sufficient. The data processed before we receive your request may still be legally processed.

We will continue to store the data collected during registration for as long as you remain registered on our website. Statutory retention periods remain unaffected.

Processing of data (customer and contract data)
We collect, process, and use personal data only insofar as it is necessary to establish, or modify legal relationships with us (master data). This is done based on Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract. We collect, process and use your personal data when accessing our website (usage data) only to the extent required to enable you to access our service or to bill you for the same.

Collected customer data shall be deleted after completion of the order or termination of the business relationship. Legal retention periods remain unaffected.

Data transmitted when entering into a contract
We transmit personally identifiable data to third parties only to the extent required to fulfill the terms of your contract, for example, to companies entrusted to deliver goods to your location or banks entrusted to process your payments. Your data will not be transmitted for any other purpose unless you have given your express permission to do so. Your data will not be disclosed to third parties for advertising purposes without your express consent.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

Data transferred when signing up for services and digital content
We transmit personally identifiable data to third parties only to the extent required to fulfill the terms of your contract with us, for example, to banks entrusted to process your payments.

Your data will not be transmitted for any other purpose unless you have given your express permission to do so. Your data will not be disclosed to third parties for advertising purposes without your express consent.

The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (b) DSGVO, which allows the processing of data to fulfill a contract or for measures preliminary to a contract.

sections.title: 5. Social media

Share content via plugins (Facebook, Google+1, Twitter, etc.)
The content on our pages can be shared on other social networks like Facebook, Twitter, or Google+. This page uses the eRecht24 Safe Sharing Tool. This tool establishes direct contact between the networks and users only after users click on one of these buttons.

This tool does not automatically transfer user data to the operators of these platforms. If users are logged into one or more of the social networks, the Like, +1, and Share buttons for Facebook, Google+1, Twitter, etc. will display an information window in which the user can edit the text before it is sent.

Our users can share the content of this page on social networks without their providers creating profiles of users' surfing behavior.

Facebook plugins (Like & Share buttons)
Our website includes plugins for the social network Facebook, Facebook Inc., 1 Hacker Way, Menlo Park, California 94025, USA. The Facebook plugins can be recognized by the Facebook logo or the Like button on our site. For an overview of Facebook plugins, see https://developers.facebook.com/docs/plugins/.

When you visit our site, a direct connection between your browser and the Facebook server is established via the plugin. This enables Facebook to receive information that you have visited our site from your IP address. If you click on the Facebook "Like button" while you are logged into your Facebook account, you can link the content of our site to your Facebook profile. This allows Facebook to associate visits to our site with your user account. Please note that, as the operator of this site, we have no knowledge of the content of the data transmitted to Facebook or of how Facebook uses these data. For more information, please see Facebook's privacy policy at https://de-de.facebook.com/policy.php.

If you do not want Facebook to associate your visit to our site with your Facebook account, please log out of your Facebook account.

sections.title: 6. Analytics and advertising
sections.content:
Google Analytics
This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service. It is operated by Google Inc., 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA.

Google Analytics uses so-called "cookies". These are text files that are stored on your computer and that allow an analysis of the use of the website by you. The information generated by the cookie about your use of this website is usually transmitted to a Google server in the USA and stored there.

Google Analytics cookies are stored based on Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO. The website operator has a legitimate interest in analyzing user behavior to optimize both its website and its advertising.

IP anonymization
We have activated the IP anonymization feature on this website. Your IP address will be shortened by Google within the European Union or other parties to the Agreement on the European Economic Area prior to transmission to the United States. Only in exceptional cases is the full IP address sent to a Google server in the US and shortened there. Google will use this information on behalf of the operator of this website to evaluate your use of the website, to compile reports on website activity, and to provide other services regarding website activity and Internet usage for the website operator. The IP address transmitted by your browser as part of Google Analytics will not be merged with any other data held by Google.

Browser plugin
You can prevent these cookies being stored by selecting the appropriate settings in your browser. However, we wish to point out that doing so may mean you will not be able to enjoy the full functionality of this website. You can also prevent the data generated by cookies about your use of the website (incl. your IP address) from being passed to Google, and the processing of these data by Google, by downloading and installing the browser plugin available at the following link: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout?hl=en.

Objecting to the collection of data
You can prevent the collection of your data by Google Analytics by clicking on the following link. An opt-out cookie will be set to prevent your data from being collected on future visits to this site: Disable Google Analytics.
For more information about how Google Analytics handles user data, see Google's privacy policy: https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245?hl=en.

Outsourced data processing
We have entered into an agreement with Google for the outsourcing of our data processing and fully implement the strict requirements of the German data protection authorities when using Google Analytics.

Demographic data collection by Google Analytics
This website uses Google Analytics' demographic features. This allows reports to be generated containing statements about the age, gender, and interests of site visitors. This data comes from interest-based advertising from Google and third-party visitor data. This collected data cannot be attributed to any specific individual person. You can disable this feature at any time by adjusting the ads settings in your Google account or you can forbid the collection of your data by Google Analytics as described in the section "Refusal of data collection".

sections.title: 7. Newsletter
sections.content:
Newsletter data
If you would like to receive our newsletter, we require a valid email address as well as information that allows us to verify that you are the owner of the specified email address and that you agree to receive this newsletter. You can revoke consent to the storage of your data and email address as well as their use for sending the newsletter at any time, e.g. through the "unsubscribe" link in the newsletter. The data provided when registering for the newsletter will be used to distribute the newsletter until you cancel your subscription when said data will be deleted. Data we have stored for other purposes (e.g. email addresses for the members area) remain unaffected.

support.title: Technical Support
support.metaDesc: K-Aqua Technical Support – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.

seoText.p1: K-Aqua's technical support is the backbone of our global infrastructure projects. We know that every second counts when installing industrial piping systems and PP-R high-performance lines. Our expert team for fluid technology and polymer systems assists international general contractors, architects, and civil engineers every step of the way.
seoText.p2: From initial planning and isometric calculations to pressure loss layout and on-site welding process monitoring – we guarantee flawless implementation. Our Polypropylene Random Copolymer (PP-R) systems require the highest level of craftsmanship. That is why our Academy provides continuous training, while our support intervenes during complex thermal expansion challenges or specific fluid pressure requirements.
seoText.p3: By utilizing state-of-the-art diagnostic tools and predictive maintenance algorithms, we reduce downtime to an absolute minimum. Whether it involves cold water systems in desert regions, high-purity industrial plants, or heating networks in arctic zones – the K-Aqua support infrastructure ensures smooth operation and the uncompromising longevity of your investment.

items.title: Predictive system monitoring
items.desc: Our algorithms continuously analyze anomalies in the infrastructure. Before a critical condition is reached, our Level 3 team intervenes. Zero tolerance for latency. Zero tolerance for failures. We act before the error occurs.

items.title: Military response times
items.desc: For us, an SLA is not a guideline, but a physical law. In the event of critical incidents, we guarantee initial responses in milliseconds and immediate escalation to dedicated senior engineers. No waiting, just immediate execution.

items.title: Architecture audits
items.desc: Your systems are put to the test according to the strictest standards of German engineering. Scalability, redundancy and reliability are verified through rigorous stress tests. Vulnerabilities are eliminated, not managed.

items.title: Direct developer access
items.desc: Forget conventional support. For complex system integrations, you communicate directly with our core developers. No first-level filter, but raw, unfiltered technical expertise for immediate problem solving at the source code level.

sticky.title: Sovereignty in a crisis
sticky.lead: How we maintain system integrity under extreme load conditions.

items.title: Anomaly detection
items.text: Automated systems detect micro-deviations in the data stream long before a visible failure.

items.title: Diagnostic triage
items.text: AI-powered log analysis isolates the error vector. Assignment to the exact right specialist cluster.

items.title: intervention
items.text: Applying hotfixes or automatically rerouting traffic to redundant high-availability nodes.

items.title: Root cause analysis
items.text: Forensic investigation of the incident. Modification of the core architecture for permanent prevention.

items.title: Post-mortem protocol
items.text: Detailed technical report with cryptographic signature for complete transparency and audit security.

timeline.title: The emergency: chronicle of an intervention
timeline.desc: Every second counts. Our standardized process in the event of a critical system anomaly. Calculated cold. Mercilessly executed.

hero.desc: No room for compromises. Absolute precision in system maintenance and architectural scaling. Our support network operates with ice-cold, industrial authority to harden your infrastructure against any physical or digital threat.

intro.p1: We do not view IT support as a downstream process, but rather as an integral part of the system architecture. If your systems fail, production comes to a standstill. This is unacceptable.
intro.p2: Our engineers work with surgical precision. Every log file is analyzed and every latency peak is examined. We build systems that heal themselves and back them with a support team that responds before your monitoring dashboards even turn red.
intro.p3: Welcome to the German standard for high availability.

timeline.title: Evolution of precision.
timeline.desc: How we have been redefining the standards for piping systems for 30 years.

items.title: The first technical documentation
items.text: As a pioneer in plastic pipe extrusion, we defined the first standards for PP-R pipe systems in Germany. Our specifications became the blueprint for the industry.

items.title: ISO Certification & Global Standards
items.text: With international expansion, our technical data sheets have been adapted to global standards, always with the premise: The German standard is the absolute baseline, not an exception.

items.title: BIM & Digital Twins
items.text: Introduction of high-precision Building Information Modeling (BIM) data. Projects worth billions are now planned virtually with K-Aqua systems before the groundbreaking takes place in reality.

items.title: Real-time data & predictive analytics
items.text: Our current catalogs and technical sheets are dynamic data models that integrate real-time performance parameters from global installations. German engineering in the digital age.

sticky.title: The DNA of German Engineering.
sticky.lead: A K-Aqua data sheet is more than columns of numbers. It is the promise that every part installed will do exactly what the engineers have calculated.

items.title: The anatomy of our specifications
items.desc: A K-Aqua data sheet is not just paper. It is the distilled result of thousands of hours of rigorous stress testing. We document tolerances in the micrometer range because in megaprojects a deviation of one millimeter can have catastrophic consequences.

items.title: Materials science: PP-RCT in numbers
items.desc: Our downloads provide in-depth molecular analyses. You will find out exactly why the crystalline structure of our PP-RCT material remains stable for over 50 years at 90°C continuous load. Data that gives structural engineers and engineers absolute security.

items.title: Hydraulic precision
items.desc: Flow velocities, pressure loss tables, cavitation limits. Our documents provide fluid mechanics at an academic level, prepared for immediate practical application. Planned for high-rise buildings where water must be transported against extreme gravity.

items.title: tested. Worldwide.
items.desc: SKZ, DVGW, WRAS, KIWA – our download section is a vault of global quality seals. Every certificate is written proof of our uncompromising zero-defect policy.

bento.title: Specifications without compromise.
bento.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't rely on promises, but on hard facts. Here you will find the technical parameters that define our market leadership.

items.title: Technical data sheets
items.desc: Micrometer-precise measurements, pressure loss tables and thermal expansion coefficients. The Bible for every planner.

items.title: Certificates & Standards
items.desc: Written proof of our zero-defect tolerance. Documented safety according to ISO, DVGW, SKZ and more.

items.title: BIM & CAD models

items.title: Product catalogs 2026
items.desc: The entire K-Aqua portfolio on over 500 pages. From 20mm pipes to 500mm industrial fittings, fully documented.

methodology.subtitle: The K-Aqua methodology
methodology.title: Why our data is inviolable.
methodology.p1: In the construction industry, errors often only become apparent years after completion. If a plumbing system in the walls of a 50-story skyscraper fails, the damage could be in the millions.
methodology.p2: That's exactly why we subject our systems to extreme aging tests. We simulate 50 years of continuous stress in our high-pressure laboratories. The results flow directly into our technical documents.

card1.desc: Dimensional accuracy in extrusion, documented in every batch.

card2.title: 0 errors

items.title: Maximum Data Depth (LOI 500)
items.desc: Our BIM models offer not only highly precise geometric representation (LOD) but, above all, unsurpassed information depth (LOI). Every pipe, every fitting, and every valve contains all critical metadata: material specifications, pressure ratings, thermal expansion coefficients, and exact article numbers for automated tendering.

items.title: Clash-Free Planning
items.desc: In billion-dollar projects, clash detection is non-negotiable. Our native Revit and IFC files guarantee seamless integration into your Navisworks or Solibri. The exact outer diameters including weld seam tolerances prevent costly surprises on the construction site.

items.title: Parametric Intelligence
items.desc: K-Aqua BIM families are fully parametric. They dynamically adapt to pipe routing, gradients, and dimensions. The integrated auto-routing automatically selects the correct reducers and bend angles according to the strict requirements of DIN EN ISO 15874.

items.title: Lifecycle & Facility Management
items.desc: The digital twin does not end with the handover of the building. Our BIM objects are COBie-compatible and provide Facility Management with all necessary maintenance intervals, certificates, and operational data for a secure lifecycle of over 50 years.

sticky.title: Digital Twins in Perfection.
sticky.lead: An insight into the data depth that eliminates the difference between planning and reality.

items.title: Conception & MEP Planning
items.text: Integration of K-Aqua base geometries into the early design. Quick quantity takeoff and initial clash detection for the routing concept in the MEP master plan.

items.title: Execution Planning
items.text: Switching to LOI 400. The exact specifications, flow velocities, and pressure loss calculations flow directly into the hydraulic network calculation of the building.

items.title: Tendering & Awarding
items.text: Automated generation of flawless Bills of Materials (BOM) directly from the model. Each fitting is backed by the K-Aqua article number and VDI 3805 data.

items.title: Prefabs & Assembly
items.text: Export of isometric drawings for industrial prefabrication. Millimeter-precise spool drawings reduce welding work on the construction site to an absolute minimum.

items.title: As-Built & Operation
items.text: Handover of the as-built model. The digital twin serves as a Single Source of Truth for Facility Management throughout the entire lifecycle of the building.

timeline.title: The Lifecycle of K-Aqua BIM Data
timeline.desc: From the first sketch to decades of operation. Our data accompanies your project in every phase.

When international general contractors plan skyscrapers, data centers, or high-security laboratories, they don't need estimated values – they need physical reality in the form of data.
